description.content:
Data model for Tock guest profiles as published in the Tock API documentation (https://api.exploretock.com/docs/latest/guest_profile.html). Guest profiles are read via the Data Exports API and created/updated via the Guest Profile Ingest API (basic guest information only). This specification documents the canonical guest profile object and all nested types. Access requires a Tock API key (request from integrate@tockhq.com) and a Premium or Premium Unlimited plan.

Contact Support:
 Name: Tock Engineering
 Email: eng@tockhq.com
